title: Design a Regular Expression
description: Build and explain a regex for a specific matching task.
content:
Write a regular expression that matches: {{requirement}}

Provide the pattern in {{flavor}} syntax, a plain-language breakdown of each part, 3 strings it SHOULD match and 3 it should NOT, and a note on any catastrophic-backtracking risk and how to avoid it. Prefer readability (named groups) over cleverness.
